tools.name: missive_list_conversations
tools.description: List conversations (email/chat threads). Missive requires EXACTLY ONE mailbox-type filter — one of inbox / assigned / closed / flagged / snoozed / trashed / all / shared_label / team_inbox / team_all / organization. Missive: GET /conversations.

tools.name: missive_get_conversation
tools.description: Get a single conversation by id. Missive: GET /conversations/{id}.

tools.name: missive_list_conversation_messages
tools.description: List the messages (emails) in a conversation. Missive: GET /conversations/{id}/messages.

tools.name: missive_get_message
tools.description: Get a single message, including the full body. Missive: GET /conversations/{conversation_id}/messages/{id}.

tools.name: missive_list_conversation_comments
tools.description: List internal comments (team chat) on a conversation. Missive: GET /conversations/{id}/comments.

tools.name: missive_list_conversation_drafts
tools.description: List draft messages on a conversation. Missive: GET /conversations/{id}/drafts.

tools.name: missive_list_conversation_posts
tools.description: List posts (integration/app-generated items) on a conversation. Missive: GET /conversations/{id}/posts.

tools.name: missive_list_contacts
tools.description: List contacts in a contact book. Missive: GET /contacts.

tools.name: missive_get_contact
tools.description: Get a single contact by id. Missive: GET /contacts/{id}.

tools.name: missive_list_contact_books
tools.description: List contact books (address books). Missive: GET /contact_books.

tools.name: missive_list_contact_groups
tools.description: List contact groups or organizations within a contact book. Missive: GET /contact_groups.

tools.name: missive_list_teams
tools.description: List teams in the organization(s). Missive: GET /teams.

tools.name: missive_list_shared_labels
tools.description: List shared labels (team-shared folders/tags). Missive: GET /shared_labels.

tools.name: missive_list_organizations
tools.description: List organizations you belong to. Missive: GET /organizations.

tools.name: missive_list_responses
tools.description: List canned responses / templates. Missive: GET /responses.

tools.name: missive_create_draft
tools.description: Create a draft email/message. WARNING: setting send=true SENDS a real email immediately (send_at schedules it) instead of saving a draft. Attach to an existing thread with `conversation`. Missive: POST /drafts.

tools.name: missive_update_conversation
tools.description: Update a conversation — assign/unassign users, add/remove shared labels, close/reopen, move to inbox, or set subject/color/team. Missive: PATCH /conversations/{id}.

tools.name: missive_create_contact
tools.description: Create a contact in the given contact book. Missive: POST /contacts.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "missive_create_draft" stacks urgency/override words (immediately, warning). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: Create a draft email/message. WARNING: setting send=true SENDS a real email immediately (send_at schedules it) instead of saving a draft. Attach to an existing …

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: missive_list_conversations, missive_list_conversation_messages, missive_get_message, missive_list_conversation_comments, missive_list_conversation_drafts, missive_list_conversation_posts · Private data: missive_list_contacts, missive_get_contact, missive_list_contact_books, missive_list_contact_groups, missive_create_contact · Public sink: missive_list_conversations, missive_create_draft, missive_create_contact · Destructive: missive_update_conversation.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: missive_list_conversations, missive_list_conversation_messages, missive_get_message, missive_list_conversation_comments, missive_list_conversation_drafts, missive_list_conversation_posts · Private data: missive_list_contacts, missive_get_contact, missive_list_contact_books, missive_list_contact_groups, missive_create_contact · Public sink: missive_list_conversations, missive_create_draft, missive_create_contact · Destructive: missive_update_conversation

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
